## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] **README.md** — features table and architecture notes reviewed; updated if needed
- [ ] **docs/decisions/** — checked for new or closed architectural decisions; ADR added if needed
- [ ] **FiveTalents-site** — landing page reviewed; updated if a feature shipped or changed status
- [ ] **Build passes** — `dotnet build` and `npm run build` both succeed locally
